name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality】25917 Passport 👏👏 'Courchevel Passeport' is the perfect choice as a gift. Reinterpreted in dreamy beige to highlight the bag used to carry it. The functional design combines a sophisticated atmosphere with timeless charm, and the Monogram-Unplant leather of the Maison stands out. Dimensions: 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm
